growth_records.medium: NOB mineral salts medium (lithoautotrophic; modified from Spieck and Lipski)

up.method: measured during chemostat cultivation (this study); used to constrain FBA at steady-state D=0.006 h-1

up.compound: CO2 / bicarbonate (inorganic carbon, sole C source)
up.method: autotrophic fixation confirmed by 13C-bicarbonate tracer; specific rate not numerically stated in text (model-predicted flux in Fig 4 only)
aerobic (DO ~30%); specific O2 uptake given only as model-predicted flux in Fig 3, not as an in-text numeric value

sec.method: mass balance: 'all nitrite was consumed stoichiometrically to nitrate', so nitrate production approximately equals measured nitrite uptake of 8.5 mmol gDW-1 h-1

yields.NGAM_nongrowth_associated_maintenance: 0.90 mmol ATP gDW-1 h-1 (from FIG S1 y-intercept 0.90 mmol NO2- gDW-1 h-1 x 1 mmol ATP/mmol NO2-)

growth_records.cite: Lawson et al. Investigating the Chemolithoautotrophic and Formate Metabolism of Nitrospira moscoviensis by Constraint-Based Metabolic Modeling and 13C-Tracer Analysis. mSystems (2021). DOI:10.1128/mSystems.00173-21. [PMC8407350]
growth_records.snippet: when the nitrite uptake rate was set to 8.5 mmol NO2- g dry weight-1 h-1, the specific biomass growth rate equaled 0.006 h-1 (~116-h doubling time). ... Cultures were maintained in steady-state growth at a dilution rate of 0.006 h-1 and a s
growth_records.notes: Chemolithoautotrophic steady-state chemostat (membrane bioreactor). Experimental basis: dilution rate D = 0.006 h-1; at chemostat steady state mu = D = 0.006 h-1. Doubling time td = ln2/mu = 0.693/0.006 = 115.5 h (paper rounds to ~116 h). Nitrite uptake qS = 8.5 mmol NO2- gDW-1 h-1 measured during chemostat cultivation (this study); note Koch et al. reported ~8.7 for comparison. Nitrate secretion computed by stoichiometric mass balance from statement that nitrite is consumed stoichiometrically to nitrate => qNO3 ~ qNO2 = 8.5 mmol gDW-1 h-1. Cultivation: T=39 C, pH=7.7 (1 M KHCO3 buffer), stirred 150 rpm, DO ~30%, sparged Ar/CO2 (95:5) + air at 10 ml/min; CO2 sole carbon source (13C-bicarbonate tracer confirmed autotrophy). Medium = NOB mineral salts (Spieck & Lipski) with CaCO3 replaced by CaCl2.2H2O and trace-element mix listed above; base macro-salt (NaCl/MgSO4/KH2PO4 etc.) concentrations not numerically given in text (by reference). CO2 and O2 specific uptake and CO2-fixation fluxes appear only as model-predicted (FBA, Fig 3/Fig 4) values not stated numerically in text, so left null to avoid reporting model predictions as measured rates. Maintenance parameters: GAM 535 mmol ATP gDW-1, NGAM 0.90 mmol ATP gDW-1 h-1 (NGAM = FIG S1 y-intercept 0.90 mmol NO2- gDW-1 h-1 x model ATP yield 1 mmol ATP/mmol NO2-).
